violations.description: Tests assert directly against mutable repository workflow files, so unrelated concurrent edits can affect outcomes.
violations.suggestion: Snapshot required workflow fixtures into isolated temp workspaces per test when validating parsing logic.

recommendations: Continue using temp-repo harnesses for mutation-style policy tests.
Isolate static workflow reads in fixture snapshots to reduce coupling to repo churn.
Keep test cases parallel-safe by avoiding shared mutable runtime state.
summary: Isolation quality is high overall, with one medium risk related to direct shared-repo file dependency in CI graph assertions.
